UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAZARCHUK, DAN AN INDIVIDUAL GOLDBERG, NICOLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 112 CRESPI DRIVE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94132, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
